LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT LISA OH, EDWARD PARK'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. A R G U E D. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE PLEADINGS AND HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENT RULES AS FOLLOWS: TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON JUNE 7, 2019. BOTH SIDES TO SUBMIT COMPETING ORDERS BY JUNE 7, 2019 AT 4:30 PM. PROPOSED ORDERS TO STATE WHICH PART OF THE TENTATIVE RULING THEY AGREE AND DISAGREE WITH WHICH INCLUDE AUTHORITY AND CITATION IN WORD FORMAT BY EMAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: RUTH EKHAUS, CSR#12219, REKHAUS@SFTC.ORG
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANTS' SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE (ANTI-SLAPP) (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 6/4/19, DEFENDANT LISA OH, EDWARD PARK'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. GRANTED AS TO ALL FOUR CAUSES OF ACTION FOR CIVIL HARASSMENT, DEFAMATION, FALSE LIGHT PUBLICITY, AND INVASION OF PRIVACY. AN ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANTS' SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE (ANTI-SLAPP) IS FILED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Steven Cvitanovic, Esq. 415-546-7500 of Haight for Plaintiff.
Jonathan Varnica, Esq. 415-398-0200 of Vogl Merefith Burke LLP for Defendant Lisa Oh.
D. Gill Sperlein, Esq. 415-404-6615 for Defendant Ed Park.

RULING - A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT LISA OH, EDWARD PARK'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Taken Under Submission by June 7, 2019. Both sides to submit competing orders granting or denying the motion by June 7, 2019 at 4:30 pm. Proposed orders to state which part of the tentative ruling they agree and disagree with which include authority and citation in word format by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Ruth Ekhaus, CSR#12219, rekhaus@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/EPS)
